notes._source: Page 11 Visit diagnoses documented in this encounter

patient_summary: 73-year-old female with documented diagnoses of Mixed dyslipidemia (Primary), Essential hypertension (benign), postoperative/unspecified anemia, and leg pain. Recent labs from 07/03/2023 demonstrate ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL, iron 41 (L) ug/dL, iron saturation 15 (L)%, TIBC 279 ug/dL, eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2, triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL, VLDL 32 (H) mg/dL, LDL 62 mg/dL, HDL 54 mg/dL, and TSH Ultra Sensitive 1.320 mIU/mL. Primary care provider: Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP). Multiple follow-up outpatient appointments scheduled in 2024 with primary care, rheumatology, cardiology, and gastroenterology. Functional assessment documents difficulty walking/climbing stairs. Mental health screening scores: PHQ-2 0 and PHQ-9 0 (03/28/2023).
